mapper.sql:
c.id AS conversation_id, c.goods_id AS conversation_goods_id, c.buyer_id AS conversation_buyer_id, c.seller_id AS conversation_seller_id, c.created_at AS conversation_created_at, c.last_message_at AS conversation_last_message_at,
g.id AS goods_id, g.title AS goods_title,
b.id AS buyer_id, b.email AS buyer_email, b.nickname AS buyer_nickname, b.avatar_url AS buyer_avatar_url,
s.id AS seller_id, s.email AS seller_email, s.nickname AS seller_nickname, s.avatar_url AS seller_avatar_url
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM conversation_do c JOIN goods_do g ON g.id = c.goods_id JOIN users b ON b.id = c.buyer_id JOIN users s ON s.id = c.seller_id WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT
FROM conversation_do c JOIN goods_do g ON g.id = c.goods_id JOIN users b ON b.id = c.buyer_id JOIN users s ON s.id = c.seller_id WHERE c.goods_id = #{goodsId} AND c.buyer_id = #{buyerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversation_do (goods_id, buyer_id, seller_id, created_at, last_message_at) VALUES (#{goodsId}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, NOW(), NOW())
